ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media content item */,
  "show_ref" INTEGER /* Reference number for the show or episode */,
  "guest_subject" TEXT /* Name of the guest or subject of the content */,
  "topics_discussed" TEXT /* Summary of the topics discussed in the content */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the content was released */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., podcast, video) */,
  "select_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the content is selected for release (e.g., Watch, Listen) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the media content */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views or interactions the content has received */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the media content */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image for the media content */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the media content */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the media content is explicit or not */,
  "languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken in the media content */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Categories or genres of the media content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant keywords or tags for the media content */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Whether the media content is published or not */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Whether the media content is featured or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_content_guest_subject FOREIGN KEY ("guest_subject") REFERENCES guests ("guest_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_content_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, editor, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or about information of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest or subject */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest or subject */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography or background information about the guest or subject */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the guest's profile picture */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation or profession of the guest */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the guest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the guest record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the guest record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic (if any) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_topics" (
  "content_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content-topic association */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media content item */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_topics_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES media_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media content item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review or comment given by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES media_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, like, comment, share) */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media content item associated with the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES media_content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
